strings.L’objectif est d’éviter un programme tro: The goal is to avoid a programme that is too easy, too fast or poorly adapted. The evaluation recommends the path, session length and format.

strings.Le programme évite les séances trop lour: The programme avoids sessions that are too heavy. Duration is chosen according to age, attention and family goal.

strings.Un parcours centré sur l’usage réel: A path centered on real use
strings.Ce programme transforme le vocabulaire p: This programme turns passive vocabulary into usable sentences. The goal is to understand, answer and speak progressively, without staying blocked on theory.
strings.Adultes, adolescents et grands enfants m: Adults, teenagers and motivated older children

strings.Un chemin clair de la phrase guidée au d: A clear path from guided sentence to dialogue
strings.Le niveau ne sert pas à classer l’étudia: The level is not used to rank the student. It is used to choose the most useful sentences, corrections and situations.
strings.Pour apprendre à répondre avec des phras: To learn to answer with simple sentences and avoid freezing when speaking.
strings.Pour enrichir les réponses, reformuler e: To enrich answers, rephrase and hold a simple exchange with less hesitation.

strings.Mots connus, mots actifs et thèmes prior: Known words, active words and priority themes.

strings.Sons difficiles, articulation, rythme et: Difficult sounds, articulation, rhythm and reading aloud.
strings.Dialogues autour de la famille, du quoti: Dialogues around family, daily life, travel or a personal goal.
strings.Corrections précises et mini-plan de pro: Precise corrections and a mini progress plan after each step.
strings.Un rythme qui laisse vraiment pratiquer: A pace that really leaves room to practice
strings.Les séances gardent du temps pour parler: Sessions keep time to speak, correct and try again. The pace is adjusted according to availability and progress goals.
